title: asperula scutellaris
intro: Asperula scutellaris, also known as Wood Sorrel or Woodland Wood Sorrel, is a perennial herb belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the digestive system and act as a gentle laxative. The health benefits of Asperula scutellaris include its potential to reduce inflammation and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for gastrointestinal problems. In herbal preparations, Asperula scutellaris is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
